　　为保护许桃花不被欺负，傻小子宋钱被王麻子暴揍，扔进臭名昭著的恶魔洞，却没想到，人们传说中洞中的恶魔，竟然是仙界的莲花仙帝。
　　为了让宋钱帮助自己重返仙界，莲花仙帝耗费精力，把她的毕生修为，全部传授给宋钱。
　　获得传承的宋钱，开启了人生逆袭之路。
　　他拥有阎罗十八针，可生死人肉白骨。
　　他功夫深不可测，吊打一切宗师。
　　他有莲花天眼，可观测人的过去未来。
　　傻小子逆袭成高富帅，一步步走上人生巅峰。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3cb7f4afe2e2e8ccbe18167d5a51f0ad","author":"石头开花","author_id":"","book_id":"7444825780967722008","book_name":"乡村神医好快活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a8a098","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"18.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7444825834864509464","read_count":"185166","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2782692"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1365","tags":"都市修真,都市,乡村,神医,无敌,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o48aba5308ac12ccf10b71181d343b2df~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442501&x-signature=iftVYALE%2FH2PtM4KM3ILEGpKKwc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1702494106825101","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"220"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317350192D57E699E824B2E6E34"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":99,"forwarded_count":1,"listen
